item.title: Proudly stolen, mostly funny
item.dc:creator: wixodax1197

item.title: He'll never forget what you did.
item.description: Imagine a 12 year old child spending almost half his life on a piece of art that he treasures, and his mom burns it in front of him. She then tells him it's worthless. What a sociopath.
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

item.title: Tbh this is so sad..
item.description: I think being able to be bored and with your own thoughts is a very important part of your development as a person. This is sad that it is not happening anymore for kids. The over stimulation and constant bombarding of social media is not good for brain and personality development. https://gulfnews.com/special-reports/deadly-scroll-without-end-how-infinite-scroll-hacks-your-brain-and-why-it-is-bad-for-you-1.1676965239566
item.dc:creator: voidmain

item.title: Victoria Canal at the Kennedy Center shows how she really feels about our russian agent orange puppet president
item.description: It took a lot of guts to do something like that in a time like this. Personal safety aside, trumps followers have a way of punishing decent people doing the right thing.
item.dc:creator: sindail

item.description: If I ever meet them myself, I'll buy 'em a beer.

item.title: Fascists have feelings, too
item.description: The Muskrat gifted a 17-year-old girl one of his Swastikkkars. Seems indeed a bit - odd, no? Kay: "That's totally okay with me. He's just the same kind of narcissist, sociopathic weirdo like my Granpa. And my dad. Oh, and mom."
item.dc:creator: Che07

item.title: Severance for cosplayers by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/shorts/V_EYcW3i-H4 If cosplayers could sever themselves like in the tv show Severance, this is what it would look like haha Just a little glimpse of the duality of the life of a professional osplayer :) Have a great day everyone, Yuzu

item.title: Useful website Day 1
item.description: Radio Garden :This website allows you to listen to thousands of live radio stations world wide by rotating the globe. Every green dot represents a city or town Radio Garden is a non-profit Dutch radio and digital research project developed from 2013 to 2016 by the Netherlands Institute for Sound and Vision Radio Garden has been banned in United Kingdom and Turkey since 2022 https://radio.garden/visit/new-york-ny/9Yi25umJ Play store app https://apps.apple.com/us/app/radio-garden-live/id1339670993 iOS App https://apps.apple.com/us/app/radio-garden-live/id1339670993

item.title: Memes and things vol 138
item.description:
My whole family smoked and everything we owned was Camel or Marlboro themed for such a long time. My duffle bag as a young kid for sleepovers said Marlboro all over it.
Candy cigarettes do slap though….
Constantly.
Piss!
Love Withers.
Yes. I will always remember. Flavor of Love and Rock of Love are guilty pleasures.
*Fel Reaver sounds here*
Both.
I’m a decorator myself but over the years I’ve gotten decent at building houses
Nubbin burger tax!
item.dc:creator: razalude

item.title: Speed Kitty VS Tuxedo bird
item.dc:creator: TacticalAssaultUnicorn

item.title: Like an elephant has been lifted off me
item.description: It feels so good to be done with that. I still have to show up to class to finish my apprenticeship program, but I am done with all the thinky bits. I can finally do things again without feeling guilty that I should be studying instead. I'm gonna play so much dnd and video games. PS I'm thinking about making some videos where I rate electrical installations in video games, sound interesting or like a dud (I do have the capacity for humor, which I'm told helps).
item.dc:creator: jaxonwithanx

item.title: Another randumbp! Featuring cats!
item.description:
OOoo, my titty!
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
The glass breaking gets me.
"Dude was flyin' down the road!"
Cats catting.
First their sacks collide, and then hello CTE.
"Unarmed robbery."
Cat tax I.
Cat tax II.
item.dc:creator: LeonSpinks

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
MrPuckett here with TheFreePizzaDude!!!! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
The has been amazing for us to help as many people as we can and we can't thank you enough! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 7pm central
PJ with his new haircut is here to show you how it works for requests!
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
That's 15,132 meals since we started 995 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 135 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 255 5th, 6th, 7th and 8th by @OP 302 9th by Pizza Angel @IMPICKLERICK 330 10th, 11th and 12th by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAplenty 345 13th and 14th by Pizza Angel @heyyzthisguy 415 15th and 16th by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAPlenty 421 17th by Pizza Angel @Twirled2 500 18th, 19th and 20th by Pizza Angel @NoRoutesFound 510 21st, 22nd, Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant by @OP 535 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 605 27th, 28th, 29th, 30th and 31st by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 655 32nd, 33rd and 34th by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 700 35th, 36th and 37th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck ... Today's Grocery Tally 330 1st by Grocery Angel @AyatollahBahloni ... Alright everyone that's it for OP Today we sent out 37 meals Filled one huge grocery order That's 15,169 meals since we started 996 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.dc:creator: clipclopbipbop

item.title: Memes to look at while wearing slacks
item.description:
Some memes are 20+years old. It's only recently that I realized my meme addiction started early. Back then we didnt know how addicting memes would be
So that would make Tim Horton like Martin Luther?
Much like life
These types of photos floated around the intertubes for a time
Tom Cruise on the set of the first Mission Impossible
Edinburgh Castle, Scotland ...
We all thought these guys would be the next big thing
This is an extremely old and rare photo of Daft Punk in its early days
I need to remind myself of this every day
I have no idea who made these or id give 'em credit
Another meme from the 1920s
Ruby's Rockers formed after The Dead Kennedys broke up
This is the inspiration for Vanilla Ice's #1 hit
Gwen S during her Dolly Parton phase
The absurdity. The randomness . This is like a beautiful painting of absurdity.
Dig deep and find that inner freak
Early photoshop assistance
stage diving
The mind is devine
Bear on bear action
Hunter died during the early days of the internet. I hope he's watching us like Obi-wan . We could use a guy like him today.
picking and grinning
NRK Norwegian Public Television
item.dc:creator: ProfessorDiscoSlacksandCorduroyTrousers

item.title: What Happened Today #50
item.description: Trump cancels legal permission to live in the US for half a million people… after 8 p.m. on a Friday. He also told reporters that he never signed the proclamation invoking the 1798 wartime act that let him deport people, except his signature is published on it. Somehow he found time to threaten Tesla vandals with 20 years in a Salvadoran prison too. It’s spring’s first weekend—exactly when this admin counts on you tuning out. Don’t. This administration hides actions when people are busy--like the first weekend of spring. Keep the pressure on your elected officials. Call them using 5 calls, write them using Resistbot, and find local actions to participate in. Don't forget you can also subscribe to get these headline free every night at https://govbrief.today #Resist #GovBriefToday 1. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/21/columbia-university-funding-trump-demands 2. https://www.npr.org/2025/03/21/nx-s1-5336351/voice-of-america-trump-lawsuit-kari-lake-voa 3. https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/trump-student-loans-special-programs-moved-new-departments/story?id=120032077 4. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/21/social-securitys-lee-dudek-raises-concerns-following-judges-restraining-order.html 5. https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/montreal/us-border-canada-quebec-stanstead-library-1.7489528 6. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/dhs-shuts-down-internal-watchdog-agencies-that-advocated-for-immigrants/ar-AA1BpCtf 7. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/21/james-boasberg-trump-administration-deportations-00003815 8. https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/2025/03/21/doge-usaid-federal-workers-fired/ 9. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/21/trump-musk-tesla-protests-el-salvador-prisons 10. https://www.tampafp.com/trump-revokes-security-clearances-for-biden-former-vp-harris-and-hillary-clinton-in-sweeping-memo/ 11. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/u-s-to-revoke-legal-status-of-over-a-half-million-migrants-chnv/ 12. https://www.yahoo.com/news/trump-says-didn-t-sign-002445774.html 13. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/21/democrats-whistleblower-portal-doge
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Can't Torch This
item.description: A single unburnable copy was created to raise awareness about increasing censorship; her dystopian science fiction novel, which centers around one woman's quest for freedom in a totalitarian theocracy where women's rights are completely suppressed, has been the subject of numerous censorship challenges since its publication in 1985. The unburnable copy was auctioned off after her flamethrowing attempt, raising $130,000 for PEN America, a literary and free expression advocacy organization. As Margaret Atwood famously asserted in her poem "Spelling" – "A word after a word after a word is power". #books #science_fiction #awesome #censorship #mildly_interesting
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Thanks Mr terrif.
item.description: I started a side gig building rocket stoves while my wife could not work. I get the majority of my material from Canada( even has moose stamped), but in the last week, my price of material has doubled. So I see this coming to an end, sadly.
item.dc:creator: coolnotcooljkcool
